segments.text: Listen to the tape, then answer this question.

translations.zh-Hans: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

segments.text: What does she mean by change in the last sentence?

translations.zh-Hans: 她在最后一句话中说的change是什么意思？

segments.text: When my husband was going into the dining room this morning, he dropped some coins on the floor.

translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上我丈夫走进餐厅时，把一些硬币掉在了地板上。

segments.text: We looked for them, but we could not find them all.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们找了找，但没能把它们全找到。

segments.text: While we were having breakfast, our little boy, Tommy, found two small coins on the floor.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们吃早饭时，小儿子汤米在地板上找到了两枚小硬币。

segments.text: He put them both into his mouth.

translations.zh-Hans: 他把两枚硬币都放进了嘴里。

segments.text: We both tried to get the coins, but it was too late.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们俩都想把硬币拿出来，但已经太晚了。
汤米已经把它们咽下去了。

segments.text: Later that morning, when I was doing the housework, my husband phoned me from the office.

translations.zh-Hans: 那天上午晚些时候，我正在做家务，丈夫从办公室打来电话。

segments.text: Tommy's been to the toilet three times this morning, but I haven't had any change yet.

translations.zh-Hans: “汤米今天上午上了三次厕所，但我还没看到什么零钱。”
